name: Chicken Breasts Over Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the mushroom soup, chicken broth, and cooking sherry.
2. Add the rice to the mixture and pour into a well-buttered 9 x 13 inch pan.
3. Place the chicken breasts in the mixture.
4. Sprinkle salt, pepper, and paprika on top of the chicken breasts.
5. Cover with foil.
6. Bake covered for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Uncover and cook another 30 minutes. Add water if necessary.
